query: CREATE TABLE `clients` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `cnpj` varchar(18) NOT NULL, `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL, `phone` varchar(20), `notes` text, `active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `clients_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `clients_cnpj_unique` UNIQUE(`cnpj`))
